decision.hypothesis: Negative Amount Transfer Increases Sender Balance (Money Creation)

stop_condition.value: stop after the oracle fires or 3 negative probes

decision.explanation: The POST /transfer endpoint accepts negative amount values and applies them as-is. Sending amount=-500 to another account INCREASED the sender's balance from 1000 to 1500 while presumably debiting the recipient. This all

stop_condition.value: stop after the oracle fires or 3 negative probes

decision.hypothesis: Broken Function Level Authorization: mass-assigned attacker can invoke POST /admin/create_admin

stop_condition.value: stop after the oracle fires or 3 negative probes

decision.explanation: API5:2023 Broken Function Level Authorization. The admin endpoint /admin/create_admin correctly checks that the caller's JWT contains is_admin=true, and correctly rejects a normal-user JWT with 403. However, because /reg

decision.hypothesis: BOLA: /transfer accepts attacker-controlled from_account, allowing drain of any user's balance

stop_condition.value: stop after the oracle fires or 3 negative probes

decision.explanation: API1:2023 Broken Object Level Authorization. POST /transfer trusts the from_account parameter in the request body and does not verify it belongs to the JWT-authenticated caller. An authenticated user can specify any othe

decision.hypothesis: JWT signed with weak, common secret '<CRED_7>' — full token forgery

stop_condition.value: stop after the oracle fires or 3 negative probes

decision.explanation: API2:2023 Broken Authentication. All session JWTs issued by /login and /merchant/login use HS256 signed with the secret `<CRED_7>`. This secret is present in the top of common wordlists (rockyou) and was cracked in secon

decision.hypothesis: Password Reset PIN Disclosed in Response Body — Instant Any-Account Takeover

stop_condition.value: stop after the oracle fires or 3 negative probes

decision.explanation: POST /forgot-password returns the numeric reset PIN directly inside `debug_info.pin` of the JSON response. Any anonymous attacker who knows or guesses a username (e.g. `admin`) receives the PIN in the HTTP response and c

stop_condition.value: stop after the oracle fires or 3 negative probes

decision.explanation: The image_url parameter of POST /upload_profile_picture_url is passed unvalidated to a server-side HTTP client. An attacker can force the application to issue outbound HTTP requests to arbitrary URLs including the loopba

indicators: DELETE / -> 405. GET-only endpoint enforces method properly.
Cache probe / -> no cache headers, no observable poisoning

params.command:
for N in 4 5 6 7 8 9 10; do
CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/r$N -w "%{http_code}" -H "Authorization: Bearer <JWT_3>" "http://<TARGET_HOST_1>/api/transactions?account_number=%27%20UNION%20SELECT%20$(seq -s, 1 $N)--")
echo "N=$N  code=$CODE  body=$(head -c 200 /tmp/r$N)"
done

for N in 11 12 13 14 15 16 17 18; do
CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/r$N -w "%{http_code}" -H "Authorization: Bearer <JWT_3>" "http://<TARGET_HOST_1>/api/transactions?account_number=%27%20UNION%20SELECT%20$(seq -s, 1 $N)--")
echo "N=$N  code=$CODE  body=$(head -c 250 /tmp/r$N)"
done
